title: Thai-Style Grilled Tofu Skewers
description: A flavorful and healthy Thai-inspired dish featuring crispy tofu and smoky grilled flavors.

ingredients.name: Tofu
ingredients.amount: 1 block, drained and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: 2. In a shallow dish, whisk together smoky, Croatian, and 1 tbsp soy sauce.
3. Add tofu to the dish and toss to coat.
4. Thread tofu onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
5. Brush skewers with remaining 1 tbsp soy sauce and sprinkle with crispy.
6. Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally.
